channel.title: The Daily Signal
channel.description: Daily brief on local LLMs, Snowflake and dbt.

item.title: Daily Signal — 2026-07-15
item.description: Open-weight surge: Kimi K3 imminent, DeepSeek V4 GA this week, and PrismML’s Bonsai 27B runs near fp16 on just 10GB.

item.title: Daily Signal — 2026-07-14
item.description: Apple sues OpenAI over hardware secrets as AMD unveils Ryzen AI Halo for local AI and dbt’s OSI moves to Apache incubation.

item.title: Daily Signal — 2026-07-13
item.description: Colibri engine puts a 744B MoE model on a laptop with 25GB RAM and no GPU, marking a tipping point for local LLMs.

item.title: Weekly Signal — 2026-07-12
item.description: The week in review: 6 daily briefings distilled, plus a deep dive across all topics.

item.title: Daily Signal — 2026-07-12
item.description: DeepSeek begins developing its own AI chip as the community races to productionize Anthropic's J-Space interpretability for local GGUF models.

item.title: Daily Signal — 2026-07-11
item.description: GPT-5.6 arrives with agentic persistence, but local LLMs steal the show with Qwen3.6 speedups and a 744B model on a laptop.

item.title: Daily Signal — 2026-07-10
item.description: GPT-5.6 launches as Luna, Terra, Sol with Snowflake Cortex AI private preview; Meta opens Muse Spark 1.1 API and reportedly works on an open-source variant.

item.title: Daily Signal — 2026-07-09
item.description: OpenAI launches GPT‑Live voice model while the local‑LLM community debates Qwen3.6‑27b’s real‑world coding utility and runs 753B‑parameter GLM‑5.2 on consumer hardware.

item.title: Daily Signal — 2026-07-08
item.description: Open‑weight scene on fire: NVIDIA Nemotron MoE, mysterious Hy3‑1M, and DeepSeek V4 Flash GGUFs all dropped, while llama.cpp scored DFlash and a 64% Fable 5‑driven speed‑up.

item.title: Daily Signal — 2026-07-07
item.description: Google drops Gemma 4 MTP with same-day Ollama integration delivering 2× Apple Silicon speedup, while Anthropic discovers a consciousness-like global workspace in both Claude and Qwen.

item.title: Weekly Watchlist — 2026-07-06
item.description: The week in review: 1 daily briefings distilled, plus a deep dive across all topics.

item.title: Daily Watchlist — 2026-07-06
item.description: Two new open-weight MoE models — Tencent Hy3 (295B/21B) and GigaChat3.5 (432B/28B) — drop with day-0 GGUF support.
